title: dale_murphy (scr1b3yr3m1x)
lyrics: I'm at the bottom of a field, feeling like I'm down and it's the bottom of the knife Girl, I let you tell me who I am, now I'm just a man that I don't even recognize I've been on a losing streak, loving you and losing me Now that I know who you are, I remember who I used to be Cause I was Dale Murphy, three on my jersey, dirt on my cleats Girl, you can't hurt me, I was around the third, around 3am Sliding in the home like I did back when I was swinging for the pins And playing in the backyard since I was a youngster, always been an all-star Before you came along, I was winning Now that you're gone, I'm going back to living again When I was Dale Murphy Now the crowds got quiet but my heart still pounds Can't hear the Oscar Stadium sound, you beat me but I found my life Guess I needed heartbreak to see the light Used to pray for love, now I pray for me Learned that freedom's the MVP, I'm calming myself like the legs do Dirt on my cleats, girl, you can't hurt me Point to the stars and I'm swinging through you Sliding in the home like I did back when I was swinging for the pins And playing in the backyard since I was a youngster, always been an all-star Before you came along, I was winning Now that you're gone, I'm going back to living again When I was Dale Murphy Now the crowds got quiet but my heart still pounds Can't hear the Oscar Stadium sound, you beat me but I found my life  Used to pray for love, now I pray for me Learned that freedom's the MVP, I'm calming myself like the legs do Dirt on my cleats, girl, you can't hurt me Point to the stars and I'm swinging through you   Now that you're gone, I'm going back to living again When I was Dale Murphy Now the crowds got quiet but my heart still pounds Can't hear the Oscar Stadium sound, you beat me but I found my life Used to pray for love, now I pray for me Learned that freedom's the MVP, I'm calming myself like the legs do  Point to the stars and I'm swinging through you Now that you're gone, I'm going back to living again Before you came along, I was winning Now that you're gone, I'm going back to living again When I was Dale Murphy Can't hurt me, dirt on my cleats Can't hurt me, dirt on my cleats

lyricsSegments.text: I'm at the bottom of a field, feeling like I'm down and it's the bottom of the knife
Girl, I let you tell me who I am, now I'm just a man that I don't even recognize
I've been on a losing streak, loving you and losing me
Now that I know who you are, I remember who I used to be
Cause I was Dale Murphy, three on my jersey, dirt on my cleats
Girl, you can't hurt me, I was around the third, around 3am
Sliding in the home like I did back when I was swinging for the pins
And playing in the backyard since I was a youngster, always been an all-star
Before you came along, I was winning
Now that you're gone, I'm going back to living again
When I was Dale Murphy
Now the crowds got quiet but my heart still pounds
Can't hear the Oscar Stadium sound, you beat me but I found my life
Guess I needed heartbreak to see the light
Used to pray for love, now I pray for me
Learned that freedom's the MVP, I'm calming myself like the legs do
Dirt on my cleats, girl, you can't hurt me
Point to the stars and I'm swinging through you
Sliding in the home like I did back when I was swinging for the pins
And playing in the backyard since I was a youngster, always been an all-star
Before you came along, I was winning
Now that you're gone, I'm going back to living again
When I was Dale Murphy
Now the crowds got quiet but my heart still pounds
Can't hear the Oscar Stadium sound, you beat me but I found my life
Used to pray for love, now I pray for me
Learned that freedom's the MVP, I'm calming myself like the legs do
Dirt on my cleats, girl, you can't hurt me
Point to the stars and I'm swinging through you
Now that you're gone, I'm going back to living again
When I was Dale Murphy
Now the crowds got quiet but my heart still pounds
Can't hear the Oscar Stadium sound, you beat me but I found my life
Used to pray for love, now I pray for me
Learned that freedom's the MVP, I'm calming myself like the legs do
Point to the stars and I'm swinging through you
Now that you're gone, I'm going back to living again
Before you came along, I was winning
Now that you're gone, I'm going back to living again
When I was Dale Murphy
Can't hurt me, dirt on my cleats
Can't hurt me, dirt on my cleats
